conversation.content: Make a big black base and place that in middle on top of blue block

currentPlan.title: Black Base Construction on Blue Block

steps.description: Create a large black Part named 'CentralBase' sized 64x8x64, position it centered directly above the BlueBlock (at Y = 6), color black, material Plastic, anchored and collidable
parenting the new CentralBase part into Workspace while ensuring it doesn't overwrite existing geometry and respects coordinate alignment
